steps.t: Faeron can be found in Viznak's hideout. You should talk to Faeron about Viznak's proposition.
Viznak can be found in his hideout. You should talk to Viznak.
Viznak has provided a list of ingredients that can be found in the wilds of Agarnaith. Infected livers can be collected from gore-crows, wolves, boars…
Viznak mentioned he had a mixing bowl in his hideout. You should mix the ingredients together in the mixing bowl.
Faeron and Rhadrog can be found in Viznak's hideout. You should give the disgusting concoction to both of the Rangers.
Viznak can be found in his hideout. You should talk to Viznak.
